benefits: ~35% cost savings vs. purchasing all modules individually
Single point of contact for support

modules.name: Patient Registration & Records
modules.description: Patient registration, demographic data, medical history, visit tracking

modules.name: Appointment Scheduling
modules.description: Online/offline appointment booking, calendar management, reminders

modules.name: Electronic Health Records (EHR)
modules.description: Clinical documentation, prescriptions, progress notes, e-prescribing

modules.name: Billing & Invoicing
modules.description: Invoice generation, payment tracking, insurance claims, financial reports

modules.name: Pharmacy Management
modules.description: Drug inventory, dispensing, stock alerts, prescription management

modules.name: Laboratory Management
modules.description: Lab test ordering, sample tracking, results entry, LIS integration

modules.name: Radiology Management
modules.description: Imaging orders, DICOM integration, report generation, film tracking

modules.name: Inventory Management
modules.description: Stock tracking, purchase orders, vendor management, expiry alerts

modules.name: Staff Management
modules.description: Employee records, schedules, payroll integration, leave management

modules.name: Reports & Analytics
modules.description: Custom reports, dashboards, KPI tracking, data export (PDF/Excel)

modules.name: Multi-user Access (per 10 users)
modules.description: Additional user licenses beyond base package (10-user increments)

modules.name: Basic Training (per session)
modules.description: On-site or virtual training session (4 hours max)

modules.name: Premium Support
modules.description: 24/7 phone & email support, 2-hour response SLA, dedicated manager
